strategy: Fire is your damage — he takes +30% from it — but every Fire hit normally triggers a +40% Ice Trap on your whole team plus Blizzard.
Use the exemption: the Fire punish is off during round 2 of the duel. Blade on round 1, then kill him with a boosted Fire hit on round 2 — at 2,400 health that is very doable.
No prisms. He strips the prism and all your traps at the end of the round.
If the fight runs long, leave the two Wildclaws alive until Jokul is dead — defeating both triggers the same Ice Trap plus Blizzard punish.
He is stunable if you need to buy a safe setup round.
cheatNotes: Prisms are wasted here — he removes the prism and every trap on him at the end of the round. Build for raw Fire damage instead.
Each Fire damage spell you land triggers a +40% Ice Trap on all wizards followed by Blizzard. Painful if you chip him; irrelevant if your Fire hit kills him.
Round 2 is the free window — the Fire punish does not apply that round. Blade round 1, kill with Fire round 2.
Defeating both Wildclaws triggers the same Ice Trap plus Blizzard punish. Either kill Jokul first or accept one punish while cleaning up.
